author: boma_naps
content: As discussed in our last RPC standards call, I'm working to have our  stalled PR reviewed which includes txpool PR (#353)  started with documenting what already exists and also I found out that Geth, Erigon, Nethermind, and Reth already implement txpool_content and txpool_status with compatible semantics. Opened a new PR  https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/758 for this and left a comment on the old PR https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/353#issuecomment-3960794179 linking to it. Plan to bring this to ACDE to get visibility from other client teams and align with Besu on supporting the standard method names. cc <@194432762315407360>

author: boma_naps
content: Please <@194432762315407360> if this looks okay please let me know so I can include this to ACDE
